user.title: Configure Heiman Home

data_description.home_id: Choose one or more homes to import devices from
data_description.area_name_rule: How room names should be synchronized to Home Assistant areas

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authentication Required
reauth_confirm.description: Your Heiman Home authentication has expired. Please re-authenticate to continue using the integration.

error.no_home_selected: Please select at least one home
error.authorize_url_timeout: Authorization URL timed out. Please try again.
error.network_error: Network error occurred. Please check your connection and try again.
error.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.

abort.missing_scopes: The authorization is missing required scopes. Please authorize again with all permissions.
abort.token_invalid: Failed to authenticate with Heiman Home API. The token may be invalid.
abort.no_homes: No homes found in your Heiman Home account.
abort.homes_fetch_failed: Failed to fetch home information from Heiman Home.
abort.token_expired: Your authentication token has expired. Please re-authenticate to continue using the integration.
